name: Braised Red Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Head Red Cabbage, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until tender.
2. In a large Dutch oven, combine water, 1 cup vinegar, and 1/4 cup salt. Bring to a boil.
3. Add cabbage and cook for 10 seconds. Drain the mixture.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients (including chicken broth) into the skillet with onions. Return to a boil.
5. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 15 minutes or until cabbage is crisp-tender.
6. Remove bay leaves before serving.
